memory:memory/2026-04-09.md:1:15.snippet: # 2026-04-09 - Zayith explicitly said the Sacramento address `8319 Oliva Road, Roseville, CA 95678` is his address, and asked that it only be shared with permission. - Zayith provided phone number `2799007886` for the Stripe account. - NeighborlyWork direction shifted from broad home-services marketplace emphasis to HVAC lead generation as the main focus. - The Evergreen Leads PDF / business plan became the active model: homeowners submit once, up to 3 vetted HVAC contractors bid blind, homeowner compares quotes side by side, and the contractor pays only when they close the job. - Revenue model should emphasize HVAC lead gen, with closed-job pricing and a simpler, more conversion-focused we

memory:memory/2026-04-09.md:14:20.snippet: - The Evergreen Leads PDF / business plan became the active model: homeowners submit once, up to 3 vetted HVAC contractors bid blind, homeowner compares quotes side by side, and the contractor pays only when they close the job. - Revenue model should emphasize HVAC lead gen, with closed-job pricing and a simpler, more conversion-focused website. - Website and outreach assets were updated to match the HVAC blind-bid model, including homepage, pricing, product spec, and contractor outreach copy. - On 2026-04-09, a dedicated NeighborlyWork lead inbox/router page was built at `neighborlywork/lead-inbox.html` to centralize review, qualification, routing, and pipeline tracking for incoming leads.

memory:memory/2026-04-08.md:11:25.snippet: - Pricing evolved to a tiered model for homeowners plus a worker Pro subscription. - The guiding product principle is contractor-first simplicity: remove friction, use plain language, guide one action at a time, and keep the contractor focused on winning work, not learning software. ## Stripe account activated (2026-04-09) - Account: Jarvis Builds / NeighborlyWork - Status: LIVE - Publishable key prefix: pk_live_51TK8bS0RAVRfgrfh... - Business name: NeighborlyWork - Statement descriptor: NEIGHBORLYWORK - Support phone: +1 279 900 7886 - Address: 8319 Oliva Road, Roseville, CA 95678 - Website: https://neighborlywork.com - Gmail SMTP app password saved for autonomous email sending - GoDaddy A
